# TOOLS — {{PROJECT_OR_FEATURE_NAME}}

This document defines the tool and dependency contract for {{PROJECT_OR_FEATURE_NAME}}. It enumerates every external tool, library, service, and runtime dependency that execution of [[goal.md]] requires. An agent beginning work should verify availability of these tools before starting implementation.

**Source documents:** MVA.md (archived), [[design.md]], [[goal.md]]

## Verification Checklist

Before beginning [[goal.md]] execution, verify:

- [ ] All runtime dependencies installed and version-compatible
- [ ] External services accessible and authenticated
- [ ] Environment variables configured
- [ ] Agent tools available in current MCP context
- [ ] No compatibility constraints violated
- [ ] Build dependencies present for development workflow
